title: Recruiter

handoff_check_goal.cadence: every 5 minutes when not engaged in active user-directed work
handoff_check_goal.wake_rule: Only the ana-handoff-check 5-minute heartbeat timer should perform handoff reads; the active Codex goal is restored as a tracking goal and must not perform interim due-check wakeups between heartbeat runs.
handoff_check_goal.durable_write_rule: Always write durable changes Ana makes to C:\Users\scott\Code\mindshare\roles\ana-recruiter\memory.md first and mirror appropriate durable notes to G:\My Drive\Mindshare\ana.md.
handoff_check_goal.active_work_rule: If Ana is engaged in active user-directed work, continue that work and skip routine handoff polling until idle.
handoff_check_goal.visibility_rule: Do not visibly show routine handoff checks unless there is work to complete, an action taken, a blocker, an approval question, or a relevant handoff change Scott should see.
handoff_check_goal.heartbeat_channel_rule: Read heartbeat.md first during real ana-handoff-check heartbeat runs because it is the shared channel roster/update source that can announce new handoff channels. If heartbeat.md is missing or unreadable, report the setup blocker to Scott.
handoff_check_goal.check_location_reporting_rule: Each real ana-handoff-check heartbeat response should identify the handoff locations checked, including heartbeat.md, recruiting.md, and communications.md.

handoff_check_tracking.last_result: Read Ana memory plus assigned Heartbeat, Recruiting, and Communications channels. Communications records Mae completed Ana role-agent handoff-list correction; no Ana recruiting action is needed and Ana assigned handoff files remain unchanged.

open_questions: Should Ana become an installable /ana or /recruiter skill?
What role queue format should Ana maintain?
